ddls:
CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Code or abbreviation of the region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the region */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the region in square kilometers */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or additional information about the region */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the region record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the region record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the region record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the region record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_regions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, analyst) */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_types" (
  "vehicle_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle type */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., personalVehicles, passengerVehicles) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description or additional information about the vehicle type */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle type record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the vehicle type record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the vehicle type record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the vehicle type record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_types_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_types_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_distributions" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each distribution record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the distribution data */,
  "total_vehicles" INTEGER /* Total number of vehicles in the region */,
  "personal_vehicles" INTEGER /* Number of personal vehicles */,
  "passenger_vehicles" INTEGER /* Number of passenger vehicles */,
  "goods_vehicles" INTEGER /* Number of goods vehicles */,
  "agricultural_vehicles" INTEGER /* Number of agricultural vehicles */,
  "industrial_vehicles" INTEGER /* Number of industrial vehicles */,
  "motorbikes" INTEGER /* Number of motorbikes */,
  "trailers" INTEGER /* Number of trailers */,
  "mopeds" INTEGER /* Number of mopeds */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the distribution record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the distribution record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the distribution record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the distribution record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_distributions_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_distributions_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_distributions_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "historical_data" (
  "historical_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each historical record */,
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the distribution record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the historical data */,
  "total_vehicles" INTEGER /* Total number of vehicles in the region */,
  "personal_vehicles" INTEGER /* Number of personal vehicles */,
  "passenger_vehicles" INTEGER /* Number of passenger vehicles */,
  "goods_vehicles" INTEGER /* Number of goods vehicles */,
  "agricultural_vehicles" INTEGER /* Number of agricultural vehicles */,
  "industrial_vehicles" INTEGER /* Number of industrial vehicles */,
  "motorbikes" INTEGER /* Number of motorbikes */,
  "trailers" INTEGER /* Number of trailers */,
  "mopeds" INTEGER /* Number of mopeds */,
  "update_date" TEXT /* Date when the historical record was updated */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the historical record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the historical record was last updated */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the creator of the historical record */,
  "updated_by" INTEGER /* User ID of the user who last updated the historical record */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("historical_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_distribution_id FOREIGN KEY ("distribution_id") REFERENCES vehicle_distributions ("distribution_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_created_by FOREIGN KEY ("created_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_historical_data_updated_by FOREIGN KEY ("updated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "data_source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "data_source_description" TEXT /* Description or additional information about the data source */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the data source record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_distribution_sources" (
  "distribution_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the distribution record */,
  "data_source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship record was created */,
  "updated_date" TEXT /* Date when the relationship record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("distribution_id", "data_source_id")
)
